login.rateLimited: Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
login.accountLocked: Account temporarily locked due to too many failed attempts.
login.passkeyFailed: Passkey sign-in failed. Please try again.

register.emailExists: An account with this email already exists.
register.nameMaxLength: Name must be less than 255 characters
register.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 12 characters

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
resetPassword.resetSent: We've sent a password reset link to your email address. Please check your inbox.
resetPassword.sendFailed: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.

newPassword.title: Set New Password
newPassword.successDescription: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.
newPassword.resetFailed: Password reset failed. The link may have expired.
newPassword.invalidLinkDescription: This password reset link is invalid or missing. Please request a new one.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
